---

# Change history — pe-meta-update.prompt

## v2.10.0 — 2026-06-12

Aligned the Phase 7d Layer-B probe and the `subcheck-coverage` rationale with the metadata-precedence runtime-grounding model (vision v15.6.0). The H14 counterexample probe no longer diffs the YAML `boundaries:` list against per-boundary body twins (the retired bijection); it now confirms the agent body carries the single collective grounding directive AND that no body Always/Never entry restates a YAML boundary verbatim or contradicts/weakens it. Updated the 2026-06-11 historical-gap note to name the new grounding sub-checks. Downstream-coherence only — no phase added, no behavior change.

## v2.9.0 — 2026-06-11

Folded the per-PU coverage `status` enum into the graded-verdict enum (issue 20260607.02 doc 02, plan 02.03 I-A). The per-dimension recorded state now uses ONE enum — the graded verdict (`verified`/`pass-weak`/`partial`/`fail`) plus the `never` un-exercised sentinel — not a separate `pass|fail|partial|never` coverage enum, realizing the landed `processing-state-is-multidimensional` line ('recorded state IS the graded verdict'). Reworded the trust-mode and same-command-re-run notes from 'inherited PASS counts as never' to 'inherited `verified`/`pass-weak` counts as `never`'; added a unified-recorded-state pointer to the `subcheck-coverage` field definition (canonical fold table lives in pe-meta-evidence-coverage.md § Unified recorded-state enum). Downstream-coherence only — no vision change, no behavior change.

## v2.8.0 — 2026-06-11

Realized the dimension-coverage-grading model (issue 20260607.02 doc 02, plan 02.02 I3). Upgraded Phase 7d so the second-actor validator RE-EXECUTES a sample of declared 05.08 sub-checks against the live artifact (adversarial counterexample probe, `N = max(3, ceil(0.15 × declared sub-checks))`) instead of only re-reading the writer's quotes, and recomputes `subcheck-coverage` + per-dimension graded verdict. Added `subcheck-coverage=<fully-covered-dims>/<applicable-dims>` to the first-line `Resolved invocation:` log and field-definition list. Added Phase 8 full-coverage linter rule 6 (sub-check coverage / graded-verdict — a dimension graded `partial`/`fail` BLOCKS a clean health score, computed deterministically from the ratio; `pass-weak` flags but does not block), renumbered the reconciliation rule to 7 (now also catches `subcheck-coverage`/grade divergence) and the on-violation rule to 8; demoted rule 5 `shallow-sweep` to a BACKSTOP behind the deterministic sub-check gate.

## v2.7.0 — 2026-06-07

Broke the self-attestation loop (issue 20260607.01 complex-plan R1/R4/R5). R1 (independent audit): added Phase 7d — before Phase 8 the orchestrator hands the run outcome log to a SECOND actor, `@pe-meta-validator` in Coverage Audit mode, which independently recomputes `pu-evidence`/`shallow-sweep`; added Phase 8 full-coverage linter rule 6 (reconciliation — divergence between the orchestrator's own markers and the validator audit is a hard failure), making 'reconciled, NOT self-attested' literally true. R4 (two-layer evidence): every `dim_evidence[].evidence_ref` now MUST carry an `L<line>` locator + backticked verbatim snippet (Layer A, deterministic, every PU via `pe-check-evidence-anchors.ps1`: resolvability + literal-containment + distinctness, zero LLM calls); Layer B (sampling + on-doubt re-read) runs in the validator audit. R5-full (deterministic guard as tolerant code): created `.github/hooks/scripts/pe-check-evidence-anchors.ps1` — derives each artifact path from the outcome-log entry's `file`, hardcodes no cohort, so adding an agent or renaming a header needs no guard edit. Coverage-gap: added Phase 7b check 6 — every P0/P1 vision `scope.covers` capability must have a non-empty, on-disk implementer chain in `00.02-capability-map.md` (empty/broken = CRITICAL). Added test scenarios 24 (fabricated anchor caught by the guard) and 25 (two-actor disagreement caught by reconciliation rule 6).

## v2.6.0 — 2026-06-07

Closed two issue-20260607.01 cheapest-plan gaps. R2 (trust/reconcile contradiction): the execution-modes table said trust = `Execute baseline as-is`, contradicting plan-file-contract § 5 (a baseline never inherits per-dimension proof); rewrote the trust row so a baseline inherits only human *decisions* while every applicable PU re-emits a fresh `evidence_ref` and any `shallow-sweep=suspected` state carries forward, and added the 're-running the same command lowers confidence' note (a same `--scope`+`--dim` re-run is a doubt signal, never an auto-upgrade to clean). R5 (version-desync): added a deterministic Phase 7b Quality-preservation version-sync check — `grep` frontmatter `version:` vs bottom `*_metadata.version:` per modified agent/prompt, mismatch = HIGH (mechanical compare, caught by the check, not a human). R3 (agent-structure authority) was BLOCKED and escalated: repo-wide evidence showed the templates plus six non-pe-meta agents use emoji boundary headers, so the five pe-meta agents — not the templates — are the outlier; the plan's 'sync templates to the five siblings' direction was reversed pending a human canonical decision.

## v2.5.0 — 2026-06-07

Added the evidence-depth enforcement layer (issue 20260607.01) on top of the v2.4.0 full-processing layer — a full sweep can no longer report clean by ASSERTING per-dimension PASSes without proof. Adopted the shared evidence-bound coverage contract (pe-meta-evidence-coverage.md): Phase 4 outcome-log entries now carry a `dim_evidence[]` array of `{dim, status, evidence_ref}` for every applicable dimension (passes included). Extended the first-line log with `pu-evidence=<evidenced>/<applicable>` and `shallow-sweep=<clean|suspected>` markers. Added Phase 8 linter rule 4 (evidence-depth — hard-fail on BOTH plan and apply when any applicable PU is unevidenced) and rule 5 (shallow-sweep — BLOCK clean health score when findings cluster in frontmatter dims and body groups are silent). Also synced the stale frontmatter version (was 2.3.2 while the bottom block had already advanced to 2.4.0).

## v2.4.0 — 2026-06-06

Added the full-processing enforcement layer (issue 20260606.02) — a `breadth=full` + `--mode apply` run can no longer collapse into a frontmatter-only metadata scan and still emit a success report. F1: extended the first-line `Resolved invocation:` log with three coverage-evidence markers (`research=<ran|skipped|n-a>`, `phase4-coverage=<covered>/<total>`, `dims-exercised=<full|csv-of-D#>`). F2: added the Phase 8 full-coverage linter (mirrors the plan-file linter) with three hard-failure rules — research-ran, Phase 4 coverage, dimension-breadth — that BLOCK the report when a full-breadth apply under-processed. F3: Phase 4 now records a per-artifact outcome-log entry (`bodies_read: true`, `dims[]`) for every in-scope file, from which the linter reconciles `phase4-coverage`. F4: added embedded test scenarios 21–23 (research-skipped, under-covered Phase 4, dim-full strict-subset all HARD-FAIL). F5: added Pipeline-phases Rule #3 (execution discipline — audit phases 1/1.5/2/3/4 marked one at a time; batch-marking and cheap-proxy completion prohibited).

## v2.3.2 — 2026-06-06

Added the Phase 8 first-line-log linter (mutating-run plan-file invariant) — a mutating run (outcome log has an `applied` entry, or `--mode=plan` materialized a plan) MUST log `plan-file=<existing-path>`; `plan-file=none` on a mutating run is a hard failure that BLOCKS the report and forces re-materialization or escalation. Added embedded test scenarios 19 (apply happy-path emits `plan-file=<path>`) and 20 (linter hard-fails on `applied` + `plan-file=none`). Runtime guard complementing the v2.3.1 structural fix.

## v2.3.1 — 2026-06-06

Fixed a D6-consistency defect where Phase 6 only materialized the plan file in the `--mode plan` branch, so `--mode apply` runs executed from an in-conversation plan and emitted `plan-file=none` — violating vision v15.4 § Plan output contract (`apply = plan + execute`; plan emission non-skippable on every mutating run). Hoisted plan materialization into a new Phase 6 § Plan materialization (every mutating run — NEVER skippable) that runs BEFORE Rollback Snapshots/Apply for BOTH modes; apply then executes from the written plan (plan→execute seam, no intent re-derivation). Corrected the Phase 8 first-line-log note (plan-file emitted on every mutating run, not only `--mode=plan`) and test scenario 1 to assert `plan-file=<path>`.

## v2.3.0 — 2026-06-04

Rebased onto vision v15.4 (always plan-then-execute + orthogonal `--plan-file`). `--mode apply` now materializes/reconciles a plan (Phases 1–4) then executes it (Phases 5–7) via one execution engine shared with plan consumption (`apply = plan + execute`); `--mode plan` materializes the plan and stops. Added the eighth canonical parameter `--plan-file <path>` (plan-artifact location/identity ONLY; never decides regenerate-vs-trust) with auto-name default + timestamped fallback. Added the fresh / reconcile / trust execution-mode table off two booleans (baseline available? × research runs?); reconcile preserves human-authored decisions (escalate-not-overwrite). Extended rule #2: `--skip research` is now legal at `breadth=full` when `--plan-file` references a validated baseline (trust mode), with the cross-run drift guard REQUIRED. Added the per-phase model-routing note (Phases 1–4 reasoning model, Phases 5–7 standard model). Updated every canonical-surface enumeration seven→eight and added `--plan-file=…` to the first-line Resolved-invocation log.

## v2.2.0 — 2026-06-04

Rebased onto vision v15.3 (processing-state model). Retitled `--start`/`--end` to `<date|version>` with value-shape resolution (date OR source-version token resolved to a timestamp via the source's `version_scheme`); two guard rails (version window requires a single `--source`; `version_scheme: none` rejects version tokens). Added Phase 0a value-shape `--start`/`--end` resolution subsection. Added § Processing-state model (two-axis: source ledger at `<state.path>/triggers/<source-id>.json` + per-artifact `coverage` block as durable single source of truth; PU = artifact×applicable-dimension; staleness rule). Rewrote § Incremental filter to compute the stale-PU work set (at-least-once: never-covered always processed; no-redundant: current+pass skipped) instead of a scalar `last_review_timestamp`. Phase 8 audit log now writes per-PU coverage cells, advances the per-source ledger `last_seen_*`, demotes the markdown Last Processed Versions table to a human-readable mirror, and emits a `coverage: <covered>/<total> PUs; <n> never-covered` report line. Bounded-delta overrides recorded `pass` coverage inside `[--start,--end]` (re-baseline / distrust-recovery). Added embedded test scenarios 15-18. Echoed resolved-timestamp `--start`/`--end` in the first-line log.

## v2.1.0 — 2026-05-29

Rebased onto vision v14. Replaced v13.x surface (`--breadth`, `--since`/`--between`, `--area`/`--artifact`/`--consumer`, `--subject`/`--concern`, `--mode-review`, `catch-up`, manual `--incremental`) with seven canonical parameters (`--mode`, `--scope`, `--source`, `--dim`, `--start`/`--end`, `--deps`, `--skip`). Added value-shape `--scope` parser (artifact-type token OR path set). Added Phase 0a conversational pre-parser. Added per-artifact prompt invocation matrix routing Phase 4 work by `(scope-resolved-artifact-type, --dim)`. Added pipeline-phases/`--skip` mapping including rule #2 (`--skip research` INCOMPATIBLE with derived `breadth=full`). Added Phase 1.5 Organizational Pass gated on `breadth=full AND multi-file scope`. Added three-shape research output contract (snapshot/digest/window-digest by derived breadth). Added first-line `Resolved invocation:` log echoed BEFORE Phase 1 AND as first line of Phase 8 report. Added Phase 6 outcome-log append. Updated Phase 8 audit log to advance per-source `last_review_timestamp` only after successful applies. Preserved `--incremental` as single-migration-window alias on TRIGGER-FIRED callers only; REJECTED for manual callers (default-full-investigation). All retired flags rejected via uniform CF-05 message template. Rationales default-full-investigation and minimal-consistent-option-surface added to frontmatter.

## v2.0.0 — (date not recorded)

Eight-phase pipeline with --mode/--dim/--scope/--skip; removed preset aliases; phase-skip flags.
